title: AI Trading Bot with a projected 80-90% win rate,1-10% monthly return. Currently at a 99.6% win rate the last two month. Is that too good to be true?
author: Mediocre_Toe1489
selftext: I’ve recently come across a trading bot that’s doing very well, consistent profits. High win rate with a decent return. I’ve seen first hand what it can do so it’s hard to not believe it. Thinking about going in on it.

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: Sure, ill send you a DM

replies.author: CharlestonChewChewie
replies.body: I would also be interested in reviewing..

comments.author: SoundInvestor
comments.body: I would to hear the details as well please

replies.author: bombdizzle9
replies.body: He’s trying to sell you something

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: You know I thought it was a scam at first too. But my buddy literally made 400$ the first few days. I have screenshots of the trades too. It’s hard to not beleive it

replies.author: thuff7
replies.body: What’s the name of the service?

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: So the prop firm that offers the funded account for the AI to trade with is called paradise capital. Then the trading bot is privately owned by a developer that the prop firm is collaborating with. So you can buy and funded account and the trading bot together.

comments.author: Repsys7
comments.body: Would love the info too thanks mate

comments.author: red_riding_hoot
comments.body: Couldn't look more like a scam if they tried.

comments.author: Unhappy-Laugh-9877
comments.body:
This sounds highly like a scam. Promising an 80-90% win rate is a big red flag. It's crucial to be cautious with such claims. 

If you're genuinely interested in AI for trading, consider looking into Solvent GPT. It’s a reliable tool designed to help with your research and trading strategies without making unrealistic promises. Stay safe and do thorough research before committing to any service.

replies.author: Mediocre_Toe1489
replies.body: Thank you for your feedback, I’ll have to give solvent a look, it seems promising. I also had my doubts with the trading bot at first but a close friend of mine is using it and it is already making him winning trades and he has proof of payouts as well. So it’s hard to not believe it works.

replies.author: Tight_Sheepherder390
replies.body: How you use solvent GPT? Can I send a DM to get more info?

replies.author: Unhappy-Laugh-9877
replies.body: Hey mate, sorry I’ve been off this app. Feel free to send me a message
